title: ナリタブライアン登場！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian is so strong that she's struggled to
find real competition, which has awakened a
"hunger" within her. For her, racing is life.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her debut attracts the attention of the entire
academy. Some even say she might have what it
takes to surpass her older sister, Biwa Hayahide.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Some even expect that Brian will win the Classic
Triple Crown and surpass Symboli Rudolf, drawing
the attention of the Emperor herself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian's battle in the Twinkle Series—where
the toughest foes gather—begins now!
